    DistillationColumn.EconomicTrayOptimizationResult
    Result from an economic tray-count, feed-tray, and optional reflux/boilup search.

    Create an optimization result from the current column state.

    Evaluate one tray-count/feed-tray candidate.

    DistillationColumn.isBetterTrayOptimizationCandidate(DistillationColumn.TrayOptimizationResult candidate, DistillationColumn.TrayOptimizationResult currentBest)
